title: Decimal Indicator
text: Decimal Indicator Character to be used for the decimal place indicator for numeric fields in the tree column. Valid values: Local Default—Use the MS Windows Regional and Language Options setting (the default) Period—Use the period ( . ) character Comma—Use the comma ( , ) character Note: You can set this property only if you have set the Sorting property to Numeric . To set this property dynamically, use the Formats property. Applies To utree (Tree) Related Links Sorting Sort order used for data displayed the selected column at run time. Was this topic helpful?
